title: acrostichum crispum
intro: Acrostichum crispum, also known as the leather fern, is a type of aquatic fern that grows in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Acrostichum crispum include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
